changes.purpose: Continuous artifact consistency validator — cross-reference spine, propositions, review, reconciliation, enrichment, promotion, event logs
Advisory file-based write locking for governed artifacts — acquire/release/status/list/force-release with GuardedWriteContext
Centralized session state management — persona transitions, authority ceiling enforcement, session-scoped state reset/persist
Append-only authority escalation audit trail — log/read/summarize/verify with chronological integrity
